title: West Bengal Shocker: Rs 1 Cr Cash, Alcohol Bottles, Condoms, And ‘A Bedroom’ Found Inside School Premises; Sparks Outrage
description: The incident came to light following a formal complaint lodged by the school’s acting principal, Bikash Chandra Pal, who alleged deep-rooted financial irregularities, embezzlement, and cheating by a few staff members.
